06-support/internal-kb/billing/approval-.title: Billing Approval Workflow
06-support/internal-kb/billing/approval-.content:
Billing Approval Workflow
Purpose
This guide describes how internal teams approve billing exceptions that require manual review.
Use Cases

refund approval outside normal automation
charge reversal requests
billing exception handling for enterprise accounts

Workflow

Support raises the request with account and invoice context.
Billing operations validates the reason and supporting evidence.
A designated approver confirms the action.
The final decision is recorded in the internal audit trail.

Required Inputs

account id
invoice or event id
reason for exception
approving role

Audit Rule
No manual billing exception should be completed without a linked approver and a recorded reason.
